steps.targetDesc: the Dock at the bottom of the screen
steps.expectedState: the Dock becomes visible with app icons
steps.why: the Dock is the fastest launcher for pinned apps
steps.pitfall: if the Dock is hidden, move your cursor to the bottom edge to reveal it

steps.targetDesc: the Safari icon (blue compass rose) in the Dock
steps.expectedState: Safari launches and a new browser window opens
steps.why: single-clicking a Dock icon is the primary way to open pinned apps
steps.pitfall: double-clicking is not needed and may open a second instance if Safari is already running

steps.targetDesc: for the Safari window to fully load
steps.expectedState: the address/search bar at the top becomes active and ready for input
steps.why: Safari may take a moment on first launch or after a restart
steps.pitfall: if nothing happens, check if a Safari window opened behind other apps by clicking the Safari icon again to bring it to focus
